_README: manuscript_facts.json — THE single source of truth for every NUMBER in the manuscript. Each block carries a 'provenance' key naming the authoritative artifact/computation it was read from. Supersedes figure_facts.json (which locks only figure-displayed numbers). No number may appear in the manuscript text, tables, or captions that is not verbatim here. Aggregates were recomputed from the source CSVs, not eyeballed. Extended (Jul 10) with five reinforcement/robustness blocks: reinforcement_constraint_and_ceiling (L4/L5), reinforcement_additivity_and_certificate_scaffold (L2/L1), cross_celltype_transfer (nb07), deg_weighted_evaluation (nb08), certificate_validation (split-stability + literature/genetics cross-reference).

method.one_liner: A convex-cone directional-feasibility test: compose measured genome-scale CRISPRi effect vectors; return a model-relative cone verdict, ranked mixture, greedy sparse panel, and Farkas/KKT dual certificate.
method.certificate: Farkas'/KKT optimality certificate of the NNLS program; max stationarity violation reported as numerical proof

screen.source: Zhu et al. 2025 (Marson/Pritchard, CZI Virtual Cells Platform)
screen.provenance: figure_facts.json; Zhu et al. 2025 CD4+ T-cell CRISPRi Perturb-seq (CZI VCP); GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad shape

th2_th1_headline.positive_control_GATA3: Th2 master TF must go DOWN: reached, rank 155/6871 (97.7th pctile), cosine +0.101, on LOF/remove side
th2_th1_headline.positive_control_TBX21: Th1 master TF must go UP: correctly anti-aligned when knocked down, rank 6775/6871 (1.4th pctile)
th2_th1_headline.activation_certificate_meaning: leading positive unmet readouts at the closest knockdown-cone projection; the full residual certifies the mismatch, while individual genes are CRISPRa/de-repression hypotheses rather than proven interventions

headline_heldout_split_stability.note: Repeats the same half-gene fit/test procedure across seeds 0-11 without recomputing permutation nulls; the 60-shuffle fixed-split null remains the inferential reference.

positive_control_panel.note: TF-vs-marker split was constructed post-hoc after a weak full-panel result; documented as exploratory, not pre-registered

atlas.atlas_null_note: Eight shuffles per cell support screening/prioritization but cannot estimate a conventional permutation tail probability; the 60-shuffle headline null is the inferential reference.
atlas.takeaway: knockdown (LOF) is never the majority modality; activation (GOF) + irreducible (neither) always dominate
atlas.provenance: results/atlas_reachability.csv (12 rows; aggregates recomputed this session: mean LOF=0.3377, z-range 4.7-45.0)

calibration.headline: in-sample reachable cosine (mean 0.580) systematically OVERSTATES held-out-gene cosine (mean 0.355) by mean gap 0.225 across all 12 transitions
calibration.bootstrap_note: 85% without-replacement gene-panel bootstrap gives tight CIs (e.g. toward_Th1 Rest point 0.627, boot mean 0.639, CI [0.633,0.649]) => the gap is real, not estimation noise
calibration.provenance: results/design_calibration.csv (12 rows; aggregates recomputed this session)

anisotropy_null.provenance: results/anisotropy_null_validation.csv (20 synthetic+real rows, both in-sample and held-out columns)

transfer_norman_k562.dataset: Norman et al. 2019, Science 365(6455):786-793, K562 CRISPRa combinatorial (GSE133344)
transfer_norman_k562.additivity_meaning: measured double-perturbation vs sum-of-singles; additivity is a BOUNDED approximation, not exact
transfer_norman_k562.epistasis_mechanism: magnitude saturation (deficit grows with combined magnitude, Spearman +0.58; scale-free ceiling M*=13.9 in median-single-effect-norm units, fit R2=0.57); the intuitive collinearity->sub-additivity hypothesis was REFUTED (Spearman -0.16, n.s.)
transfer_norman_k562.provenance: results/norman_table1/2/4/5_*.csv; norman additivity 126 doubles median 0.712; epistasis memory + reachability.py additivity_risk()

modality_triage.induction_share_range: 36-49% (mean ~42%) of each transition's addressable shift needs INDUCTION (CRISPRa/ORF), unreachable by a knockdown-only screen
tractable_but_untried: IL7R (22 assoc, antibody-tractable, highest genetic support)
required_but_undruggable: IRF1 (17 immune-disease genetic assoc, top Th2 knockdown node, degrader-only / no conventional handle)
modality_triage.provenance: results/design_modality_summary.csv, modality_intervention_map.csv, design_modality_tractability.csv; Open Targets grounding

disjointness_invariant.claim: No prior method emits a feasibility VERDICT + a data-grounded CERTIFICATE on MEASURED effect vectors. 'measured-effects' methods are all forward-only predictors/rankers; 'verdict/certificate' methods are all model-theoretic (guarantee holds only inside a hand-built/inferred model). The two capabilities are DISJOINT; this method is the only entry at the intersection.
disjointness_invariant.verdict_certificate_methods_all: model-theoretic, none measured-grounded, span several families (NOT single-family)

pharma_impact.efficacy_failure_share: ~half of Phase II/III failures are lack of efficacy (Harrison 2016)
pharma_impact.genetic_support_odds: 2.6x approval odds with human genetic support (Minikel 2024)

four_value_levers.number: ~half of Phase II/III failures are efficacy; autoimmune PoS ~15%
four_value_levers.funnel_stage: redirect modality before the expensive phase

four_value_levers.number: allocates scarce screen slots / animal cohorts per arm

go_stop_redirect.GO: target has above-null directional reachability -> test a greedy sparse knockdown panel in an arrayed screen
go_stop_redirect.STOP: target provably outside the cone -> do NOT spend a CRISPRi arm on it
go_stop_redirect.REDIRECT: substantial GOF-proxy or residual demand -> consider a measured CRISPRa arm; residual coordinates prioritize hypotheses but are not the certificate itself

honesty_guardrails: Nominations are HYPOTHESES for wet-lab testing, not validated targets.
CRISPRi is loss-of-function only; activation hypotheses need a separate CRISPRa arm.
Multi-gene sets assume additivity (no epistasis) — each combination is an extrapolation to test. (Norman additivity median cos 0.71 shows it is bounded, not exact.)
One primary-cell system, four donors — external validity across genotypes/tissues is to be earned.
This is a hypothesis-prioritisation & experiment-triage instrument, NOT a target-validation engine. It does not claim a hit rate; it shifts where a program spends and where it stops.

reinforcement_constraint_and_ceiling._desc: In-silico reinforcements L4 (non-negativity ablation) and L5 (reachable-cosine ceiling), atlas-wide over 12 cells (4 transitions x 3 conditions).

L4_constraint_ablation.interpretation: Non-negativity costs mean +0.018 held-out cosine vs unconstrained least-squares, bought with ~3,537 biologically-unrealizable negative weights; the cone recovers mean 95% of the unconstrained cosine, beats the nearest single generator 12/12, and is the sole source of the Farkas/KKT certificate.

L5_reachable_cosine_ceiling.interpretation: The knockdown-only reachable ceiling equals sqrt(LOF fraction) and matches the in-sample cone cosine to 1e-4; the headline 0.448 held-out cosine is 71% of the achievable knockdown-only ceiling (atlas mean 61%), and the residual gap to 1.0 is 22-26% GOF-locked (requires activation, not knockdown).

reinforcement_constraint_and_ceiling.provenance: nb_out/L4_constraint_ablation.csv, nb_out/L5_reachable_cosine_ceiling.csv (nb06); aggregates recomputed this session; Technical_Dossier.md (Appendix C)

reinforcement_additivity_and_certificate._desc: In-silico reinforcements L2 (magnitude-capped recipe reliability) and L1 (held-out-modality certificate test scaffold).

L2_recipe_reliability.knee_convention_note: nb06 uses design_cards.json optimal_k=5 (cos 0.379); the main manuscript quotes knee k=7 (cos 0.402). Both are far below the magnitude cap; the difference is a knee-selection convention, not a discrepancy.
L2_recipe_reliability.interpretation: Every recommended knee recipe is additive-safe 12/12 (reliability 0.92-0.96); the magnitude cap binds only at k~28 vs a knee of k~4-5, a 5.6x margin on the headline.

L1_heldout_modality_certificate_scaffold.status: method verified on synthetic ground truth; blocked only on dual-arm CRISPRi+CRISPRa data, not on method
L1_heldout_modality_certificate_scaffold.real_data_requirement: a single screen with BOTH CRISPRi and CRISPRa arms on the same readout axis
L1_heldout_modality_certificate_scaffold.interpretation: The dual-modality certificate test (hide the activation arm, predict the activation-required genes from knockdowns alone) is verified on synthetic ground truth at AUROC 0.999, precision@30 0.933, z=8.9 vs a shuffle null of 0.497+/-0.056; it awaits a dual-arm dataset, not a method.

cross_celltype_transfer._desc: Cross-cell-type transfer test: K562 vs RPE1 essential-gene Perturb-seq (Replogle 2022), reachability.py unchanged. Three-level hierarchy of what transfers.
cross_celltype_transfer.data: 843 shared single-gene perturbations x 2,832 shared genes between K562 and RPE1 (Replogle 2022 essential screens, CZI cz-benchmarks-data)

level2_verdict.caveat: partly an artifact of an over-expressive 843-generator cone; the honest signal is the graded residual
level2_verdict.verdict: reachability VERDICT transfers but the honest signal is a graded residual, not a binary flip

level3_recipe.verdict: the greedy sparse candidate PANEL does NOT transfer across cell types

cross_celltype_transfer.bounds: Direction transfers, the specific greedy candidate panel does not. This is a cross-cell-type generalization probe on essential screens, NOT a second CD4+ T-cell polarization screen.
cross_celltype_transfer.provenance: nb07 (07_cross_celltype_transfer); Technical_Dossier.md (Appendix B); results cross-celltype CSVs

deg_weighted_evaluation._desc: DEG-weighted (w=|d|) evaluation addressing the signal-dilution critique of Mejia et al. (Needles in the Haystack: Addressing Signal Dilution..., ICML 2026 poster, OpenReview XsrXLPxBJw). The verdict STRENGTHENS under weighting rather than collapsing.

dynamic_range_fraction_Rest.note: Weighted fraction barely moves because the shuffled floor also rises; calibrated placement is stable, so the result is NOT a signal-dilution artifact.

deg_weighted_evaluation.calibration_scope: dynamic-range calibration computed on the Rest condition only (Monte-Carlo cost)
deg_weighted_evaluation.interpretation: Under DEG-magnitude weighting the Th2->Th1 verdict strengthens (Tier-2 CD4 cosine 0.627->0.803 at Rest) and held-out z stays >>3; the dynamic-range fraction is stable because the shuffled floor rises in step, confirming the signal is not a dilution artifact.
deg_weighted_evaluation.provenance: nb08 (08_deg_weighted_evaluation); Technical_Dossier.md (Part 1) 6.5; results DEG-weighted CSVs; critique: Mejia2026 (Needles in the Haystack, ICML 2026 poster, OpenReview XsrXLPxBJw; expanded preprint bioRxiv 2025.10.20.683304)

certificate_validation._desc: Two Jul-10 validations of the activation certificate: (A) gene-axis split-stability, (B) literature/genetics cross-reference. Together these TIGHTEN the certificate claim.

split_stability.interpretation: Top certificate genes keep their rank across a random gene-axis split (frac_in_top30=1.0, cross-half rho 0.65, half-vs-full 0.84, z~35 vs a shuffle null of ~0); the tail drifts.

literature_genetics_crossref.top_genes_are: state-markers (LYAR #1, CRTAM #4, GBP5 #8) and NEGATIVE regulators (IKZF3/Aiolos #2, CBLB #7, LAG3 #10)
literature_genetics_crossref.negative_regulator_caveat: For the negative regulators, DELETION boosts T-cell function, so an 'activate these' reading may be directionally backwards.
literature_genetics_crossref.interpretation: The largest positive residual coordinates are state markers and negative regulators, while canonical Th1 master TFs (IFNG, TBX21, STAT4, STAT1) rank deep. These coordinates prioritize follow-up readouts; they are not individual certificates or proven activation targets, and the negative-regulator direction may be backwards.
